description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named rdsn Lint and Unit Test that runs on pull requests to specific branches and paths, and on manual workflow dispatch. The workflow should have two main jobs: lint and test. The lint job runs on an ubuntu-latest container, checks out the code, and runs clang-format on the rdsn repository. The test job runs on a self-hosted container, checks out the code, and runs unit tests with different sanitizer options.
